sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 76

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 76:1
items.html:
(to the question) Nefesh of Malchut
After the Nukva attains all her Gadlut — that is, her AB, SAG, MA, and BON — she is then discerned as a complete Nefesh, and is fit to beget. (Items 11, 14)
